free_text: Neutron-induced fission cross section of 234U measured
Pole Univ. Leonard de Vinci, Paris La Defense
U3O8 (5.2 cm diam.) thin layers on Al backing (100 um
thick) prepared by the painting technique:
Density=Average surface density. Its values taken
Table I of Phys.Rev.C89(2014)044606 are too small,
but they were confirmed by D.Karadimos (2015-07-16).
